arts.ttl: Victor Boniface’s Bayer Leverkusen departure now in doubt as Al Nassr pursue Jhon Duran
arts.sum: Sky Germany reports that there have been complications when it comes to the completion of Bayer Leverkusen striker Victor Boniface’s move to Saudi Arabia. Every aspect of the deal, including the…

arts.ttl: Confusion over Boniface's proposed Al Nassr move
arts.sum: Victor Boniface's move from Bayer Leverkusen to Al Nassr has apparently not been finalized in writing.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa ACCEPT Duran offer as €100m U-turn made
arts.sum: It is Cristiano Ronaldo’s Al-Nassr that are going to win the race for the 21-year-old striker, with L’Equipe reporting that Aston Villa are about to accept a €70 million bid that will make Duran the second biggest sale in club history behind only Jack Grealish, who left for €117.5m to Manchester City in 2021. Aston Villa are on the verge of accepting a bid for striker Jhon Duran, with the Birmingham club set to hit a transfer jackpot with the departure of the Colombia international striker.

arts.ttl: Preview: Al Raed vs. Al-Nassr - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Thursday's Saudi Pro League clash between Al Raed and Al-Nassr, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Al-Nassr reach agreement to sign Victor Boniface
arts.sum: Al-Nassr have reached an agreement worth around €60m to sign Bayer Leverkusen forward Victor Boniface (24), according to Sky Germany. The Nigerian becomes the club’s second most expensive departure in…

arts.ttl: Leverkusen agree deal to sell Boniface to Al Nassr
arts.sum: Sky Germany reports that Bayer Leverkusen have reached a full agreement with Al Nassr over the transfer of Victor Boniface.
